text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking down the hall during lunch
when I see Narita Brian putting up posters.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That's one-third down... Two-thirds left to go.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe the vice president is putting up all
those posters by herself...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right... We should go see if she
needs help.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me! Do you need any―

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek! N-nothing! Never mind...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That glare of hers is so potent... It's enough to
keep anyone away!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
L-let's get out of here. She looks like she's in a
bad mood. We'll just make it worse.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not you too...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm just here on student council business.
choice_data_list:
I had no idea you were a member of the student
council.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, I am one, more or less.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I need to get all these posters up by
today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't have time to talk, so buzz off.
choice_data_list: Seems like a lot of work.
Seems like a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I don't have time to talk, so buzz off.
choice_data_list: Seems like a lot of work.
Seems like a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not really. I can do it just fine.
choice_data_list: But it'll go faster with two people, you know?
But it'll go faster with two people, you know?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm tired of arguing. Help if you want.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll go clockwise around school. You go
counterclockwise. Be quick about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is blunt with her words, but she
seems more than capable of handling her student
council duties.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I just think of it as training to get something out
of it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, see ya. I've got work to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite it being tedious and tiring work, Narita
Brian completes her student council duties
diligently.
